title: Proposed reconstitution of the Waveney, Lower Yare, and Lothingland Internal Drainage Board, reducing the number of elected members from 18 to 9
body: "Published: 3 April 2025  Consultation period end date: 3 May 2025  The Environment Agency gives notice that it has submitted to the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs for confirmation a scheme under Section 3 of the Land Drainage Act 1991 making provision for the following matters:   the reconstitution of the Waveney, Lower Yare, and Lothingland Internal Drainage Board, reducing the number of elected members from 18 to 9 any matters relating to or following from the reconstitution   A copy of the Scheme has been deposited and is available for inspection during office hours at the offices of the Environment Agency and the Water Management Alliance, at:   Environment Agency, (East Anglia Area)  Iceni House, Cobham Road, Ipswich IP3 9JD  Contact: Aaron Dixey, Flood and Coastal Risk Manager Essex, Norfolk and Suffolk  email: aaron.dixey@environment-agency.gov.uk  Telephone: 02077 141864  or  Phil Camamile, Chief Executive  Water Management Alliance, Pierpoint House, 28 Horsley’s Fields, King’s Lynn, Norfolk PE30 5DD  email: phil.camamile@wlma.org.uk  Telephone: 01553 819600   Representations with respect to the scheme may be made to the Secretary of State for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs, Flood Risk Management Team, 3rd Floor, Seacole House, 2 Marsham Street, London SW1P 4DF at any time within one month after the publication of this Notice.   Contact: Carol Tidmarsh  email address: carol.tidmarsh@defra.gov.uk   Telephone: 0208 026 2851  A copy of any representations should also be sent to:  Barbara Tyldesley, Senior Legal Assistant  Environment Agency, 8, City Walk, Leeds LS11 9AT  email: barbara.tyldesley@environment-agency.gov.uk  Telephone: 02030 256390  "
